Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TrappedLiquidFireRuptureResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result from a trapped-liquid fire rupture screening study.

The result records time histories and key event times so the same calculation can feed safety reports, PFP demand checks, and release/source-term handoffs for detailed consequence analysis.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

      Gets the segment identifier.

      Gets the limiting failure mode.
      Returns:
      limiting failure mode

    • isRupturePredicted

      public boolean isRupturePredicted()
      Gets whether pipe or flange failure was predicted.
      Returns:
      true if pipe rupture or flange failure occurred within the simulated time

    • getTimeToReliefSetSeconds

      public double getTimeToReliefSetSeconds()
      Gets the time to relief set pressure.
      Returns:
      time in s, or NaN when not reached

    • getTimeToVaporPocketSeconds

      public double getTimeToVaporPocketSeconds()
      Gets the time to vapor-pocket indication.
      Returns:
      time in s, or NaN when not reached

    • getTimeToPipeRuptureSeconds

      public double getTimeToPipeRuptureSeconds()
      Gets the time to pipe rupture.
      Returns:
      time in s, or NaN when not reached

    • getTimeToFlangeFailureSeconds

      public double getTimeToFlangeFailureSeconds()
      Gets the time to flange failure.
      Returns:
      time in s, or NaN when not reached

    • getMinimumFailureTimeSeconds

      public double getMinimumFailureTimeSeconds()
      Gets the earliest pipe or flange failure time.
      Returns:
      failure time in s, or NaN when no pipe/flange failure occurred

    • getFinalPressureBara

      public double getFinalPressureBara()
      Gets final pressure.
      Returns:
      final pressure in bara

      Gets final liquid temperature.

    • toPassiveFireProtectionDemand

      public SafetySystemDemand toPassiveFireProtectionDemand(String demandId, double requiredEnduranceSeconds)
      Creates a passive fire protection demand case from this result.
      Parameters:
      demandId - stable demand identifier
      requiredEnduranceSeconds - required PFP endurance in seconds
      Returns:
      safety-system demand record

    • createRuptureSourceTerm

      public SourceTermResult createRuptureSourceTerm(SystemInterface fluid, ReleaseOrientation orientation, double durationSeconds, double timeStepSeconds)
      Creates a full-bore source term using the result state at limiting failure.
      Parameters:
      fluid - representative fluid to clone and set to failure state
      orientation - release orientation; defaults to horizontal when null
      durationSeconds - source-term duration in s; must be positive
      timeStepSeconds - source-term time step in s; must be positive
      Returns:
      source term result from the existing release model

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Converts the result to a JSON-friendly map.
      Returns:
      ordered map representation
